purpose: checked supervisor entrypoint for the production-shaped retained-source proof that exercises live preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run receipt upload, apply revalidation, durable journal readback, inspect-first recovery, and the first remaining production-only boundary

pull_to_push_bridge.exporter: discovers the merge base and coverage evidence before any push request exists
pull_to_push_bridge.importer: persists the immutable pull base package as the only origin push may consume
pull_to_push_bridge.persisted_pull_base_package: the immutable provenance object that preflight binds to one live remote identity and one short-lived push session

push_ladder_mapping.push_preflight: pull exporter/importer provenance becomes a live remote binding and session mint
push_ladder_mapping.push_snapshot_hashes: importer provenance becomes planning-only remote hash discovery
push_ladder_mapping.push_plan_dry_run: the immutable base package becomes a receipt-only plan with no mutation authority
push_ladder_mapping.push_batch_apply: the persisted base package plus live drift evidence revalidate before every batch and at the storage boundary
push_ladder_mapping.push_journal: durable pull provenance becomes read-only recovery evidence
push_ladder_mapping.push_recover inspect: immutable provenance plus fresh live hashes classify recovery before mutation
push_ladder_mapping.push_recover auto|finish|rollback: mutating recovery requires inspect plus fresh live evidence and the same HMAC floor as apply

proof.live_preflight: production-shaped live preflight against a supplied local Playground source
proof.apply: fresh live revalidation before every batch and at the storage boundary
proof.journal: durable journal readback with apply-committed evidence

boundary.first_remaining_production_boundary: auth/session lifecycle and durable journal semantics

required_invariants: dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
snapshot hash listing is planning-only evidence and never becomes write authority
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
durable journal rows must remain readable after apply and recovery inspect
the checked release proof must show preflight auth-session type, session minting, and apply-committed journal evidence
one remote source site, one imported local site, and one drift witness are enough to prove the production topology
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
